name: Pumpkin Pie Cheesecake
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease 9-inch pie plate. In a small bowl, combine crumbs and butter; press firmly on the bottom of the prepared pie plate. In a large bowl, with an electric mixer at medium speed, beat cream cheese until fluffy. Gradually beat in sweetened condensed milk until smooth. Add pumpkin, pie spice, salt, and vanilla; mix well. Stir in eggs. Pour mixture into prepared crust. Bake 50-55 minutes, or until the center is set. Cool in pan on wire rack. Refrigerate 2 hours, or until chilled.
